question.label: Stretch now
question.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
question.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

answer: Sometimes I avoid high-ambiguity forums because I do not want to sound underprepared.

assessment.note: Avoiding high-ambiguity forums to avoid sounding underprepared signals a strong growth constraint and mild pullback from visible engagement.

history.answer_excerpt: Sometimes I avoid high-ambiguity forums because I do not want to sound underprepared.
